nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联8208种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等8208种鸟类。

nodes.name: 稀树草原
nodes.summary: 东非常见的开放草地与湿地边缘复合景观。

nodes.name: 撒哈拉以南非洲
nodes.summary: 撒哈拉以南非洲是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联90种鸟类，包括草黃樹鴨、埃及雁、Western crested guinea fowl等90种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 灌丛
nodes.summary: 低矮木本植物占优势的陆地生境。

nodes.name: Brown-hooded kingfisher
nodes.summary: Brown-hooded kingfisher（Brown-hooded kingfisher，学名 Halcyon albiventris），在图谱中标记为无危（LC）物种，主要分布于撒哈拉以南非洲，常见栖息地包括灌丛、稀树草原。

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: This kingfisher is found in Sub-Saharan Africa, in Gabon, Congo, the Democratic Republic of the Congo, Angola, Kenya, Tanzania, Zambia, Somalia, Mozambique, Malawi, Zimbabwe, Botswana, Namibia, South Africa and Eswatini. It occurs below in elevation, living in woodland, grassland with trees, scrubland, forest edge, and also cultivations, parks and gardens. It sometimes occurs near water, and can adapt to suburban habitats.{{cite encyclopedia |last=Clancey |first=P

links.label: 栖息于
links.evidence: It is found in Sub-Saharan Africa, living in woodland, scrubland, forest edges, and also suburban areas
